Camera.kind: builds the local→clip projection matrix — the actual 3D→2D camera transform (FOV/near/far → clip space)

Clone Layer.kind: output-dimension + time-remap computation for the cloned source

Generator.kind: soft-gradient generator: builds its Helium shader node (representative procedural generator)

Image.kind: image / drop-zone geometry (native bounds → placed rect)

Light.kind: spot-light surface-shading node: cone/attenuation falloff applied to lit surfaces

Rig.kind: rig fan-out solver (one master control → many driven params)

Text.kind: text layout entry (builds the glyph run from the string)

Widget.kind: rig-widget snapshot lookup/interpolation (which snapshot a slider value maps to)

nondecodable.Emitter: the particle simulation runs on the GPU render graph; no single CPU per-frame method to disassemble
nondecodable.Master: a container/reference node (master clip); no per-pixel or per-frame math of its own
nondecodable.Particle Cell: particle content descriptor consumed by the GPU emitter; no standalone CPU method
nondecodable.Project: the scene root; its "algorithm" is the document settings + the evaluation of its children (documented in Document settings)
nondecodable.Replicator: pattern layout is built on the GPU render graph (no single decodable CPU layout method); the arrangement enums (Shape/Origin/etc.) are documented from the corpus
nondecodable.Replicator Cell: a data holder for the replicator; rendered instances are GPU-built
nondecodable.Text Generator: numeric/date/timecode formatting is string-building over OZTextLayout; the format is a per-instance template, not compiled math
